mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_pw, user_name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birth, gender, phone, address, is_admin, member_status FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND member_status = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT P.P_NUMBER, P.P_TITLE, U.USER_NAME, TO_CHAR(R.C_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') C_DATE, CEIL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE P_NUMBER >= P.P_NUMBER AND P_TYPE = 'V') / 10.0 ) AS PAGE_NUM FROM REPLY R JOIN POST P ON R.P_NUMBER = P.P_NUMBER JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE R.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY R.C_NUMBER DESC

SELECT P.P_NUMBER, P.P_TITLE, U.USER_NAME, TO_CHAR(P.P_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') C_DATE, P.P_TYPE, CASE P.P_TYPE WHEN 'V' THEN CEIL( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST WHERE P_NUMBER >= P.P_NUMBER AND P_TYPE = 'V') / 10.0 ) WHEN 'R' THEN CEIL( / 10.0 ) END AS PAGE_NUM FROM POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY P.P_NUMBER DESC
SELECT user_id, user_pw, user_name, TO_CHAR(birth, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS birth, gender, phone, address, is_admin, member_status FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
